
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 44. The winner's curse and regression to the mean**

| Power | δ = θ/ s | Type S | Type M |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0.06 | 0.30 | 0.197 | 7.9 |
| 0.10 | 0.65 | 0.045 | 3.7 |
| 0.20 | 1.14 | 0.005 | 2.25 |
| 0.30 | 1.45 | 0.001 | 1.81 |
| 0.50 | 1.96 | <10 −4 | 1.41 |
| 0.80 | 2.80 | <10 −6 | 1.12 |
:::
